days.title: Port Douglas → Cairns
days.route: Short shake-out leg south down the coast road.

days.title: Cairns → Charters Towers
days.route: Up through the Atherton Tablelands, then west into the dry interior.

days.title: Charters Towers → Clermont
days.route: Across Queensland's central highlands on the Gregory Developmental Road.

days.title: Clermont → Emerald
days.route: Short day through the Bowen Basin — a breather before the long runs south.

days.title: Emerald → Roma
days.route: South-west through Springsure and Injune, into the Maranoa.

days.title: Roma → Cunnamulla
days.route: West across the Channel Country — flat, red, and surprisingly beautiful.

days.title: Cunnamulla → Broken Hill
days.route: South-west across the state border into outback New South Wales.

days.title: Broken Hill → Mildura
days.route: South along the Silver City Highway, then across into Victoria's Sunraysia.

days.title: Mildura → Bendigo
days.route: South through the Murray-Darling irrigation country and into central Victoria.

days.title: Bendigo → Melbourne
days.route: The final run down the Calder Highway to Melbourne — finish line at St Kilda.
